packages.description: The Panch Kedar Yatra is a profound spiritual journey through the majestic Garhwal Himalayas, beginning from the holy city of Haridwar and leading pilgrims into the heart of Lord Shiva’s divine presence. The journey proceeds through Sonprayag and Gaurikund, the sacred gateway to the revered Kedarnath Temple, where Lord Shiva is worshipped in his hump form amid snow-clad peaks.
